title: Version 10.0 — Campaign Bedrock
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stage["10.0.x Campaign Bedrock"] --> contract["Contract"]
    stage --> service["Service"]
    stage --> surface["Surface"]
    stage --> data["Data"]
    stage --> ops["Ops"]
    contract --> gate["Release gate"]
    service --> gate
    surface --> gate
    data --> gate
    ops --> gate

flowchart LR
    app["CampaignWizard UI"] --> gql["appointment360 GraphQL"]
    gql --> svc["emailcampaign REST API"]
    svc --> queue["Asynq campaign:send"]
    queue --> worker["worker + SMTP"]
    worker --> logs["logsapi S3 CSV"]
    worker --> suppress["Connectra suppression sync"]
micro_gate:
**Patch intent bands:** `.0` charter · `.1`–`.2` scaffold · `.3`–`.5` hardening · `.6`–`.8` integration · `.9` minor freeze / handoff.
Theme: **Forge** — codenames in per-patch `10.0.P — *.md` files.

contract.text: Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Freeze **campaign** GraphQL module types: `CampaignMutation { createCampaign, updateCampaign, deleteCampaign, pauseCampaign, resumeCampaign }` and `CampaignQuery { campaigns, campaign(id) }` per [`docs/backend/apis/`](../backend/apis/).
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Freeze **sequence** module types: `SequenceMutation { createSequence, addStep, removeStep }` and `SequenceQuery { sequences, sequence(id) }`.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Freeze **template** module types: `TemplateMutation { createTemplate, updateTemplate }` and `TemplateQuery { templates }`.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Lock `emailcampaign` REST routes: `POST /campaigns`, `GET /campaigns/:id`, `POST /campaigns/:id/send`, `GET /campaigns/:id/status`.

Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **s3storage:** Define campaign artifact contracts (audiences, suppressions, templates, evidence bundles); enforce compliance-grade immutability (S3 Object Lock or equivalent) for campaign execution artifacts.

Completed: 📌 Planned: **[emailcampaign]** — refine duplicate task (was: 📌 planned: **[architecture]** — product **graphql** remains …) | patch `10.0.0` band `0` | reason: specialize this file vs sibling patches; see docs/codebases/emailcampaign-codebase-analysis.md

service.text: Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Fix JWT middleware auth in `emailcampaign` service (per codebase analysis).
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Fix SMTP auth token query bug.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Implement **idempotency key tracking** for campaign creation and enqueue paths to prevent duplicate outreach.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Construct the definitive **`completed_with_errors`** terminal state for campaigns to handle partial delivery failures.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Wire Asynq `campaign:send` worker with SMTP concurrency limits and queue lag monitoring.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **s3storage:** Store consent/opt-out/suppression lineage evidence references in `metadata.json` for campaign-related objects.

Completed: 📌 Planned: **[emailcampaign]** — refine duplicate task (was: 📌 planned: **[architecture]** — **go/gin satellites** in sco…) | patch `10.0.0` band `0` | reason: specialize this file vs sibling patches; see docs/codebases/emailcampaign-codebase-analysis.md

surface.text: Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **app:** `CampaignWizard` UI bound to campaign creation GraphQL — step-based form (audience → template → schedule → review).
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **app:** `CampaignList` page with status badges, progress bars, and action buttons (pause/resume/cancel).
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **app:** `SequenceBuilder` drag-and-drop step editor (if applicable in `10.0`, otherwise stub).
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **app:** Template preview and variable insertion UI.
Campaign management pages: wizard, list, detail, analytics.
Sequence builder: step editor, timing configuration.
Template management: preview, variable insertion, asset upload.

data.text: Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Validate schema: `campaigns`, `sequences`, `templates`, `recipients`, `campaign_events` tables aligned.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Add `templates` table migration and `unsub_token` column per codebase analysis.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Bridge Unsubscribe tokens to Connectra's global suppression lists.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Campaign event lineage: `emailcampaign` → `logsapi` S3 CSV archiving.

Completed: 📌 Planned: **[emailcampaign]** — refine duplicate task (was: 📌 planned: **[architecture]** — **postgresql-first** per `do…) | patch `10.0.0` band `0` | reason: specialize this file vs sibling patches; see docs/codebases/emailcampaign-codebase-analysis.md

Completed: 📌 Planned: **[emailcampaign]** — refine duplicate task (was: 📌 planned: **[architecture]** — **redis exit**: campaign (as…) | patch `10.0.0` band `0` | reason: specialize this file vs sibling patches; see docs/codebases/emailcampaign-codebase-analysis.md
**S3:** Template assets via `s3storage`; campaign event CSVs via `logsapi`.

ops.text: Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Smoke: create campaign → schedule → send → verify delivery event in `logsapi`.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Document rollback: pause + cancel campaign if SMTP delivery regresses.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: SMTP concurrency and queue lag baseline metrics.
Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: Deliverability preflight gate: suppression merge before send.

Completed: ✅ Completed: ⬜ Incomplete: **contact360.io/jobs** — no campaign-specific job processors exist in `processors/registry.py`; the current registry handles `email_finder_export_stream`, `email_verify_export_stream`, `email_pattern_import_stream`, `contact360_import_prepare`, `contact360_export_stream` but has no `campaign_send_batch` or `campaign_bounce_check` job types; add these two processors to the registry to make the jobs scheduler the backbone of email campaign delivery.

Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **contact360.io/jobs** — implement `campaign_send_batch` processor: read recipient batch from S3 (input key in job `data`), dispatch emails via the campaign email send API, write per-recipient delivery events to `job_response`; integrate with `emailcampaign` service via HTTP client similar to `email_api.py`.

Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **contact360.io/jobs** — implement `campaign_bounce_check` processor: fetch bounce and complaint events from the email provider (SES SNS, Mailgun webhook, etc.), update recipient status in the `emailcampaign` PostgreSQL database, and emit a `campaign_bounce_processed` event to `job_events`.

Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **contact360.io/jobs** — implement `campaign_suppression_sync` processor: on each campaign send job, fetch the global suppression list from Connectra's `/contacts/suppressed` endpoint and filter recipients before sending; record suppressed recipient count in `job_response`.

Completed: ✅ Completed: 📌 Planned: **contact360.io/jobs** — wire campaign send jobs to the DAG engine: create a campaign DAG with `campaign_send_batch` child jobs (one per recipient batch) fanned out from a parent `campaign_prepare` node; use the existing `edges` table and DAG degree-decrement logic to finalize the campaign when all batches complete.

Completed: 📌 Planned: **[emailcampaign]** — refine duplicate task (was: 📌 planned: **[architecture]** — **observability**: correlate…) | patch `10.0.0` band `0` | reason: specialize this file vs sibling patches; see docs/codebases/emailcampaign-codebase-analysis.md
